summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new 'Enciclopedia de Métricas' tab feature on /financial-metrics page. All 10 test cases passed successfully.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height). Non-blocking but could be cleaned up.

encyclopedia_tab_visibility.description: Tab 'Enciclopedia de Métricas' visible and clickable on /financial-metrics page

left_navigation_metrics.description: Left navigation shows all 21 metrics grouped by 5 categories (Márgenes, Retorno, Eficiencia, Liquidez, Solvencia)

metric_selection.description: Clicking a metric in the left nav loads its detail on the right

section_tabs.description: Section tabs (¿Qué mide?, Razonamiento, Relevancia, Fórmula, Métricas relacionadas) are clickable and show content

evaluation_levels.description: Evaluation levels expand on click showing threshold and description with color-coded indicators

performers_tabs.description: Best Performers / Worst Performers tabs switch content correctly

quote_section.description: Quote section shows author and company (e.g., Warren Buffett, Berkshire Hathaway)

how_to_improve.description: How to improve section expands on click showing numbered tips

tab_switching.description: Switching between Métricas Financieras tab and Enciclopedia tab works without breaking either

related_metrics_navigation.description: Related metrics links navigate to the correct metric detail (tested ROIC -> ROE navigation)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Encyclopedia feature fully implemented and tested. Key data-testids: tab-encyclopedia, metric-encyclopedia, enc-nav-{key}, enc-section-{key}, enc-eval-{idx}, enc-tab-best, enc-tab-worst, enc-how-to-improve. All 21 metrics have complete data including sections, evaluations, performers, quotes, and improvement tips. Spanish language throughout.
